account_description: Update the administrator display name, email, and role.
assistant_reply_conversation: Conversation context updated for "{title}". I will answer using the {knowledgeBase} knowledge base and keep the response compact.
assistant_reply_operation: Operation plan drafted for "{title}". Knowledge base: {knowledgeBase}. Next step is to confirm the execution boundary for: {prompt}
composer_placeholder: Enter a question, operation request, or task context...
dashboard_description: Use this dashboard to review the current task context, operating posture, and recent activity before adjusting detailed settings.
dashboard_metric_active_base_copy: New tasks inherit this retrieval source until they are changed individually.
dashboard_metric_in_progress_copy: Tasks that still require a response, execution, or review.
dashboard_metric_primary_model_copy: The default model currently used for general assistant responses.
dashboard_metric_total_tasks_copy: Conversation and operation threads currently kept in the local workspace state.
dashboard_operating_posture_description: Approval, response style, cache, theme, and language remain globally shared across all tasks.
dashboard_recent_tasks_empty: There are no recent tasks yet.
general_cache_card: Control how local cache is restored across sessions and refreshes.
general_locale_card: Switch interface language without changing the URL structure.
general_theme_card: Set the default appearance for the admin console.
knowledge_description: Configure the default source, query scope, and test query.
login_description: Enter an admin workspace that preserves task context, drafts, and global settings.
login_side_desc: This is a UI-only login flow for entering the workspace and demonstrating local persistence.
login_tip_one: Remember recent tasks, panel widths, and visited admin tabs.
login_tip_three: Keep room for real execution, retrieval, and approval flows later.
login_tip_two: Switch tasks and right-side panels without remounting the whole shell.
models_description: Set the default primary model, operation model, and routing policy.
panel_cache_hint: These rule settings are currently stored only in local state and can be replaced with real backend policies later.
rename_task_description: Update the task title shown in the rail and the active workspace header.
rules_description: Control approvals, response style, cache behavior, and execution boundaries.
sample_task_one_assistant: The overall requirements are aligned. The current priority is to establish a persistent three-column shell.
sample_task_one_summary: Organize the three-column workspace, theme, routing, and cache behavior.
sample_task_one_user: First narrow the design, then confirm interactions and routing in batches.
sample_task_three_assistant: The real index and recall constraints are not ready yet, so keep the UI and state model in place first.
sample_task_three_summary: Waiting for further confirmation on the knowledge base data structure and retrieval strategy.
sample_task_two_assistant: Recommend using Paraglide with persisted language and theme preferences.
sample_task_two_summary: Complete language switching, light and dark mode, and brand color tokens.
save_state_hint: Task context, drafts, theme, and language preferences are persisted locally.
task_default_assistant_message: Task context is ready. You can start a new conversation or operation flow.
task_default_summary: Waiting for the next conversation or operation instruction.
workspace_empty_description: Select a task from the left rail, or create a new one to start a conversation or operation flow.
workspace_empty_hint_one: Draft an operating rule or review an existing policy.
workspace_empty_hint_three: Outline a new admin task and then open it from the task rail.
workspace_empty_hint_two: Compare model choices, knowledge sources, or approval settings before execution.
